title: just dropped 5 ETH for bug bounty rewards on my OSS project. your contributions r making a real diff

audit.reason: The security audit report is well-structured, clearly identifies vulnerabilities, and proposes solutions. The addition of community feedback enhances the report's relevance and applicability.
audit.improvements: Consider providing more detailed code snippets for each proposed solution to illustrate how the fixes can be implemented. Additionally, including a section on how to mitigate gas fees could provide more comprehensive guidance.
